LanguageData.FB_AcidBroodmother.label: acid broodmother
LanguageData.FB_AcidBroodmother.description: A draftable fused fleshbeast that regenerates gastric acid and periodically grows temporary acid-spitting offspring.
LanguageData.FB_AcidBroodmother.tools.0.label: heavy maw
LanguageData.FB_AcidSpitling.label: acid spitling
LanguageData.FB_AcidSpitling.description: A temporary offspring that launches acid shells and returns to its broodmother when its internal reservoir runs low.
